Explicit Interface Implementations

AGSServerConnectionName

The connection name object for this server object.

virtual IAGSServerConnectionName AGSServerConnectionName { get; set; }

Returns

IAGSServerConnectionName

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<P>The name object for an&nbsp;<STRONG>AGSServerConnection. </STRONG>The <STRONG>AGSServerConnectionName </STRONG>for an&nbsp;AGSServerConnection can be persisted, for example, in a map document. An application can call the <STRONG><A href="JavaScript:Jump('esriSystem/IName_Open.htm')">Open</A> </STRONG>method on the <STRONG>AGSServerConnectionName</STRONG> after loading it from persistent storage in order to connect to and get an object reference to the GIS server or web service catalog.</P>

Indicates if metadata can be edited.

bool
